summary: The eth-wire multiplex divergence is rustfmt-only: capability errors, protocol proxy validation, poll returns, and reserved-message error formatting changed syntactically without changing routing behavior.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 150: M	crates/net/eth-wire/src/multiplex.rs.

The isolated patch only adds semicolons or reformats return delimiters in capability-sharing checks, send/mask/unmask empty-message errors, stream polling, connection errors, dispatch break paths, unknown reserved message errors, and readiness errors.

No capability matching, protocol channel creation, message ID masking/unmasking, primary stream draining, out-buffer sending, delegated message routing, disconnect propagation, or pending/ready behavior changed.
